(iii) Also called the earth summit
(iv) 190 states Pledged in this summit
(v) Commitment to achieve by 2020
A) i, ii, iv B) i, ii, iii
C) iii, iv, I D) all
101. In recent years, which type of conservation
has advanced beyond keeping threatened
species in enclosures? (Pg. 267, E)
A) In-situ conservation
B) Ex-situ conservation
C) None of these
D) Both A & B
